<!-- Thanks for contributing! See CONTRIBUTING.md. -->

## What & why
Describe the change and the motivation. Link any related issue (`Fixes #123`).

## How it was tested
- [ ] `cd backend && ruff check . && pytest` passes
- [ ] `cd frontend && npm run lint` passes (if frontend touched)
- [ ] Manual check / eval harness (describe)

## Checklist
- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`) per the [DCO](../DCO)
- [ ] I have read and agree to the [CLA](../CLA.md)
- [ ] New source files carry the `SPDX-License-Identifier: AGPL-3.0-only` header
- [ ] Change fits the project scope (README "Scope & limits")
